translations.en: a slender, graceful man tuning a lute.
translations.zh: 一位身形纖細、舉止優雅的男子，正在調音一把琉特琴。

translations.en: "Hello. There's something I need to ask you, what was it..."
translations.zh: 「你好。吾有件事要問汝，是什麼來著……」

translations.en: "Oh, yes, now I remember!"
translations.zh: 「哦，對了，吾想起來了！」

translations.en: "Hail and welcome, $P!"
"My name is Selganor. 'Tis a name with a long @history..."
translations.zh: 「吾的名字是瑟爾嘉諾。此乃有著悠久@history（歷史）的名字……」

translations.en: "But you have the look of one with more important @business."
translations.zh: 「但汝看起來有更重要的@business（事情）。」

translations.en: "It means 'seeker of the @crystal'. Perhaps I'll tell you more some other time."
translations.zh: 「它的意思是『@crystal（水晶）的追尋者』。或許改天吾再告訴汝更多。」

translations.en: "That's quite a @tale."
translations.zh: 「那真是一段@tale故事。」

translations.en: "Indeed."
translations.zh: 「確實。」

translations.en: "Perhaps you're interested in joining the @guild."
translations.zh: 「或許汝有興趣加入@guild（公會）。」

translations.en: "I am the @guildmaster of artisans."
translations.zh: 「吾是工匠@guildmaster（公會）的會長。」

translations.en: "I already loaned you the rune."
translations.zh: 「吾已經把聖符借給汝了。」

translations.en: "I'd be glad to loan you the rune, but only members of the @guild are allowed to handle it."
translations.zh: 「吾很樂意把聖符借給汝，但只有@guild（公會）成員才能取用它。」

translations.en: "Wait a minute... You're already a member of the guild!"
translations.zh: 「等一下……汝已是公會成員了！」

translations.en: "If you want to join the guild, you need to do two things."
translations.zh: 「若汝想加入公會，需要做兩件事。」

translations.en: "First, you need to make a set of @panpipes. @Julia can teach you how to that."
translations.zh: 「首先，汝需要製作一組@panpipes（排笛）。@Julia（茱莉）亞可以教汝如何製作。」

translations.en: "You also need to commit '@Stones' to memory. 'Tis a simple tune - ask @Gwenno to play it for thee."
translations.zh: 「汝還需要記住一首叫《@Stones（石頭）》的曲子。這是首簡單的曲調——去請@Gwenno（葛溫）諾為汝演奏。」

translations.en: "Yes, ask her about it."
translations.zh: 「是的，去問她吧。」

translations.en: "She made my @lute - and most of our other instruments as well."
translations.zh: 「她製作了吾的@lute（琉特）琴——以及吾等大多數的其他樂器。」

translations.en: "She lives just across the road, next door to Lady @Isabella."
translations.zh: 「她就住在對面，@Isabella（伊莎）貝拉夫人隔壁。」

translations.en: "She's the mayor."
translations.zh: 「她是市長。」

translations.en: "I know she's around here somewhere..."
translations.zh: 「吾知道她就在這附近某處……」

translations.en: "I'm right here, Selganor!"
translations.zh: 「吾就在這裡，瑟爾嘉諾！」

translations.en: "Ah, I knew you'd be somewhere close by."
translations.zh: 「啊，吾就知道汝就在附近某處。」

translations.en: "I prefer stringed instruments. They make such lovely sounds."
translations.zh: 「吾偏愛弦樂器。它們發出如此美妙的聲音。」

translations.en: "Oh, are you looking for the man who invented the balloon?" He stares upward, stroking his chin pensively.
translations.zh: 「哦，汝在找發明氣球的人？」他仰頭沉思，撫摸著下巴。

translations.en: "Ah yes, now I remember. He flew to @Sutek's castle."
translations.zh: 「啊，對了，吾想起來了。他飛去了@Sutek（蘇特）克的城堡。」

translations.en: "Said something about a big job he had to do there."
translations.zh: 「說是那裡有件重要的事要做。」

translations.en: "Sutek lives on an @island, far to the south."
translations.zh: 「蘇特克住在南方遠處的一座@island（海島）上。」

translations.en: "It's east of Serpent's Hold."
translations.zh: 「在蛇盤要塞的東方。」

translations.en: "It was nice talking to you."
translations.zh: 「很高興與汝交談。」

translations.en: "I don't think I can help you there."
translations.zh: 「吾恐怕幫不上那件事的忙。」

translations.en: "You should play your panpipes often - 'twill lighten your step on the long road ahead."
translations.zh: 「汝應該常常吹奏排笛——此乃前路漫漫中的輕盈之道。」

translations.en: "Have you made a set of panpipes?"
translations.zh: 「汝製作了一組排笛了嗎？」

translations.en: "Oh. Well, @Julia can show you how if you need help."
translations.zh: 「哦。那麼，若汝需要幫助，@Julia（茱莉）亞可以教汝。」

translations.en: "But I don't see any!"
translations.zh: 「但吾看不到任何排笛！」

translations.en: He inspects the pipes. "Very good, very good indeed."
translations.zh: 他仔細查看排笛。「非常好，真的非常好。」

translations.en: "Now tell me the sequence of notes in 'Stones' and I'll induct you into the guild."
translations.zh: 「現在告訴吾《石頭》的音符序列，吾便讓汝加入公會。」

translations.en: "Numeric notation will be fine."
translations.zh: 「數字記譜即可。」

translations.en: "Excellent!" He strums a chord on his lute, then taps you lightly once on each shoulder with it.
translations.zh: 「太好了！」他撥弄了一個和弦，然後用琴輕輕點了汝雙肩各一下。

translations.en: "You are now a full member of the guild of artisans."
translations.zh: 「汝現在正式成為工匠公會的成員了。」

translations.en: He reaches into a belt-pouch, takes out the Rune of Sacrifice, and hands it to you.
translations.zh: 他伸手入腰包，取出奉獻聖符，遞給汝。

translations.en: "I'm sure you'll be needing this in your travels."
translations.zh: 「吾相信汝在旅途中會用到這個。」

translations.en: "I know you'll find some solution to this gargoyle problem."
translations.zh: 「吾相信汝終會找到解決魔像族問題的辦法。」

translations.en: "No, I'm afraid that's not it. Gwenno can help you learn the notes."
translations.zh: 「不，恐怕不是這樣。葛溫諾可以幫汝學習音符。」

translations.en: "Oh, hello. Maybe you can help me with something."
translations.zh: 「哦，你好。或許汝能幫吾一個忙。」

translations.en: "My nephew is studying alchemy, and he needs to know this."
translations.zh: 「吾的姪兒在學煉金術，他需要知道這個。」

translations.en: "What kind of fork should mandrake roots be prepared with?"
translations.zh: 「曼德拉草根應用哪種叉子來處理？」

translations.en: "No, that doesn't sound right. If only I had a Compendium to look it up in..."
translations.zh: 「不，那聽起來不對。要是吾有一本百科全書可以查就好了……」

translations.en: "What part of the nightshade mushroom is used in spellcasting?"
translations.zh: 「毒茄菇的哪個部位用於施法？」

translations.en: "No, that doesn't sound right. If only I had a Compendium to look it up in..."
translations.zh: 「不，那聽起來不對。要是吾有一本百科全書可以查就好了……」

translations.en: "Where does sulfurous ash come from?"
translations.zh: 「硫磺灰從何而來？」

translations.en: "No, that doesn't sound right. If only I had a Compendium to look it up in..."
translations.zh: 「不，那聽起來不對。要是吾有一本百科全書可以查就好了……」

translations.en: "What are black pearls used for?"
translations.zh: 「黑珍珠有何用途？」

translations.en: "No, that doesn't sound right. If only I had a Compendium to look it up in..."
translations.zh: 「不，那聽起來不對。要是吾有一本百科全書可以查就好了……」

translations.en: "Thanks! Now what can I do for you?"
translations.zh: 「謝謝！現在吾能為汝做什麼？」

translations.en: "Hmmmm... I wish I knew the answer to that question..."
translations.zh: 「嗯嗯……吾真希望吾知道那個問題的答案……」

translations.en: He turns away from you absent-mindedly.
translations.zh: 他心不在焉地轉身離開。

translator_notes: 瑟爾嘉諾是米諾克工匠公會的健忘會長，也是個音樂家。持有奉獻聖符，只借給公會成員。要加入公會需製作排笛並背誦《石頭》曲調（678987 8767653）。知道氣球師飛往蘇特克城堡。
